info.name: TCCR Backend — Full API Collection v2.6
info.description:
Complete API test collection for TCCR (The Christian Center Rathmalana) backend.
Aligned with API Reference v2.22.0 (26 May 2026).
Covers all V1 and V2 endpoints across 13 microservices.

Test flow:
1. Run 🔐 Sign In first — populates all *Token and *Id variables
2. Run folders in order (1️⃣ → 📊) — each folder saves IDs used by later folders
3. Before each Newman run: node scripts/_restore-seeds.js

Prerequisites (online Firebase):
  docker-compose up (services running against e-learning-f4209)
  node scripts/_restore-seeds.js

Prerequisites (emulator):
  npx firebase emulators:start
  node scripts/seed-emulator.js && node scripts/seed-v2-roles.js
  docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up

Key V2 changes vs V1:
  • Registration auto-approves as Member (no pending_approval queue)
  • Roles are additive arrays: ["member","student","leader","g12"]
  • Role Requests: PATCH /me (profile) → POST /me/qualification (PDF) → POST /role-requests { requestedRole: "student" }
  • Batches: intake cohorts under each course
  • Cell Groups, Cell Reports, Analytics dashboards
  • Federated OAuth (Google + Apple SDK + Apple web flow)

request.description:
Upload or replace the authenticated user's qualification PDF.
Stored under qualifications/{uid}.pdf in Firebase Storage.
The download URL is saved as qualificationUrl on the user document.
This URL is automatically included when POST /role-requests is called.

Field        | Type | Required
-------------|------|--------
qualification | file | Yes — PDF only, max 10 MB

Newman note: 400 is expected (no real file on disk). Use Postman UI to test a real PDF upload.
